If you upload your residence permit/Aufenthaltstitel, you can black out sensitive information if you want.

The following information must remain clearly visible:
- Full name
- Validity date
- Address

All other sensitive information can be blacked out.

Please also bring your original residence permit/Aufenthaltstitel and health insurance card/proof with you on the tournament day.

label: Travel & Accommodation

Tournament: Nepali Europapokal 2026
Date: Saturday–Sunday, 4–5 July 2026
Location: Sportanlage Grüngürtel, Askanierring 149, Berlin
Team: NFT Munich
The exact travel plan and accommodation details are not final yet. Final information about departure, return, hotel, and costs will be shared later in the WhatsApp group.
Join our WhatsApp group for all travel updates and team communication.
Once your registration is confirmed, you will be added to the team WhatsApp group for further updates.
Travel & Return Availability
The team will most probably travel to Berlin on Friday evening, 03.07, and return on Monday. Exact details will be shared later in the WhatsApp group.
